message:
Running command: # Steps 47, 48, 49 all completed successfully. Step 50 died mid-run (no runtime.txt).
# Delete step 50's incomplete directory so librelane resumes cleanly from it
rm -rf /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/50-openroad-repairdesignpostgpl
echo "Deleted incomplete step 50"

# Verify step 49 state_out has what we need
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/49-openroad-stamidpnr/state_out.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
keys = list(d.keys())[:8]
for k in keys:
    v = str(d[k])[:80]
    print(f'  {k}: {v}')
"
